description: 问题。ask a question = 问问题。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have a question?","zh":"你有问题吗？"}]
[{"en":"Please answer my question.","zh":"请回答我的问题。"}]
[{"en":"Yes, I am.","zh":"是的，我是。"}]
[{"en":"No, I'm not.","zh":"不，我不是。"}]

description: do的过去式。构成过去疑问句。
examples_json: [{"en":"Did you eat?","zh":"你吃了吗？"}]
[{"en":"Did you go to school yesterday?","zh":"你昨天上学了吗？"}]
[{"en":"What is your name?","zh":"你叫什么名字？"}]
[{"en":"Where is the bathroom?","zh":"洗手间在哪里？"}]
[{"en":"When do you get up?","zh":"你几点起床？"}]
[{"en":"Why are you late?","zh":"你为什么迟到？"}]
[{"en":"Which one is yours?","zh":"哪个是你的？"}]
[{"en":"Whose book is this?","zh":"这是谁的书？"}]
[{"en":"Because I was sick.","zh":"因为我生病了。"}]

description: 疑问副词。How + 形容词/副词。
examples_json: [{"en":"How are you?","zh":"你好吗？"}]
[{"en":"How many books?","zh":"多少本书？"}]

description: 与不可数名词连用。How much...?
examples_json: [{"en":"How much is it?","zh":"多少钱？"}]

description: 频率副词。How often = 多久一次。
examples_json: [{"en":"How often do you exercise?","zh":"你多久锻炼一次？"}]
[{"en":"How about some coffee?","zh":"来点咖啡怎么样？"}]
[{"en":"Call me in an emergency.","zh":"紧急情况给我打电话。"}]
[{"en":"Please call an ambulance!","zh":"请叫救护车！"}]
[{"en":"I lost my passport.","zh":"我丢了护照。"}]
